$schema: Commit tracker for oisee/vibing-steampunk — grouped by release, auto-triaged

commits.message: docs(contexts): session wisdom — security scrub and lock-handle bug class
commits.relevance: Docs only — session wisdom referenced in 22517d4 evaluation

commits.message: fix(adt): close the lock-handle bug class — Stateful + ModificationSupport guard
commits.relevance: Root cause of all 423 ExceptionResourceInvalidLockHandle errors across all SAP ADT clients. Fix: (1) parse modificationSupport from lock response — if false, fail early with clear error instead of cryptic 423; (2) verify stateful session isolation in ARC-1. All lock-handle issues in VSP #88, #91, #92, fr0ster #57, abap-adt-api #36 trace back to this.

commits.message: fix(saml): address PR #97 review follow-up notes
commits.relevance: SAML follow-up. ARC-1 doesn't use SAML.

commits.message: docs(claude): add sanitize policy for identifiers in tracked files
commits.relevance: Internal ops docs.

commits.message: chore: drop tracked amdp-breakpoint-test-results-*.log
commits.relevance: Housekeeping.

commits.message: feat(cr-audit): treat DOMA in CR as implicit cover for its FIXVAL node
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool — DOMA in transport implicitly covers fixed values (FIXVAL). Not an MCP tool. Interesting ADT domain knowledge: DOMA and FIXVAL are linked objects in transport.

commits.message: feat(cr-audit): classify orphans by DDIC delivery class
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool. DDIC delivery class (A/C/G/S/W/E/L/M/P/V) classification for transport objects.

commits.message: feat(cli): vsp recover-failed-create — CLI wrapper for the recovery primitive
commits.relevance: CLI wrapper for recover-failed-create. The MCP-level primitive (f00356a) is the relevant part for ARC-1.

commits.message: feat(mcp): Phase 3 — RecoverFailedCreate recovery primitive
commits.relevance: Recovery primitive for partial-create state (5xx during create → object exists but may lack source). Recovers by checking existence then updating. ARC-1's 409 hint ('use update instead') already handles most cases. Future enhancement: auto-recovery on 5xx-then-409.

commits.message: feat(cr-audit): DDIC delivery class filter — transactional and views no longer false-positive as MISSING
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: feat(cr-audit): 1-hop transitive reach + MD report parity + scope fix
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: fix: two high defects from f6b1726 review + statement-order literal scope
commits.relevance: CLI tool bug fixes.

commits.message: fix(adt): reconcile partial-create on 5xx + cr-config-audit v2a.1 polish
commits.relevance: Phase 1 of partial-create recovery. On 5xx during create, check if object was partially created. Related to f00356a.

commits.message: feat(cr-config-audit): per-object L2 cache for CROSS/WBCROSSGT scans
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: fix(cr-config-audit): drop OR-LIKE batching, parallelise per-object instead
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: feat(cr-config-audit): v2a-min value-level literal matcher
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: perf+fix(cr-audit): batch CROSS/WBCROSSGT, TFDIR batch, TADIR by (type,name), maxObjects warning
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool performance.

commits.message: feat(cr-audit): stable order, FUGR progress, and L2 sqlite cache
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: feat(cr-config-audit): v1.2a — DDIC metadata chain
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool.

commits.message: feat: cr-config-audit v1 and FUGR source extraction fix
commits.relevance: CLI governance tool + FUGR source extraction fix. The FUGR fix is notable: function module sources in FUGR groups need special handling in source extraction. ARC-1 getFunctionModule reads source correctly via dedicated endpoint.

commits.message: chore(security): redact environment-specific identifiers from tracked docs and tests
commits.relevance: Security hygiene in docs. Not relevant.

commits.message: chore(security): expand .gitignore to cover operational scratch dirs
commits.relevance: gitignore update.

commits.message: feat: add SAML SSO authentication for S/4HANA Public Cloud (#97)
commits.relevance: SAML SSO auth (programmatic + browser) for S/4HANA Public Cloud with IAS. ARC-1 uses BTP OAuth / Destination Service instead. Low priority unless SAML-only customers appear. Credential-cmd pattern is independently interesting.

commits.message: feat: detect HANA database from S4CORE component in GetSystemInfo (#100)
commits.relevance: HANA detection fallback via S4CORE component. ARC-1 GetSystemInfo could benefit if database type detection is needed.

commits.message: fix: enforce SAP_ALLOWED_PACKAGES on existing-object mutations (#101)
commits.relevance: CRITICAL: ARC-1 has the SAME BUG. checkPackage() only called on create, not on update/delete/edit_method. Package allowlist can be bypassed for mutations to existing objects. Must fix immediately.

commits.message: fix: correct releaseState bug and update tests for C0-C4 API structure
commits.relevance: API release state was reading from uninitialized variable instead of actual C1.Status.State. ARC-1 should verify its getApiReleaseState extracts correctly.

commits.message: feat: default mode changed to hyperfocused
commits.relevance: vibing-steampunk now defaults to hyperfocused (1 tool) instead of focused (100 tools). Market signal: single-tool mode is winning. Validates ARC-1's intent-based approach.

commits.message: feat: add tr-boundaries, cr-boundaries, cr-history commands
commits.relevance: CLI-only transport/CR boundary analysis. Queries E070A, R3TR, LIMU tables. Not MCP tools — CLI commands for analysis reports.

commits.message: fix: batch SAP IN-clause queries to 5 items (255-char limit)
commits.relevance: SAP has 255-char limit on WHERE clauses in free SQL. Queries with many items need batching. ARC-1 should verify RunQuery handles long IN clauses gracefully.

commits.message: feat: two-pass package resolution (TADIR + TFDIR fallback)
commits.relevance: CLI-only package resolution for function modules via TFDIR. Not an MCP tool.

commits.message: fix: RELEASE-State in runAPISurface (andreasmuenster)
commits.relevance: Related to a66bcd5 — same API release state fix from community contributor. Verify ARC-1 implementation.

commits.message: feat: CO_TRANSPORTED edge kind for co-change signals
commits.relevance: Graph analysis edge type — CLI-only boundary analysis.

commits.message: feat: graph export formats (DOT, PlantUML, GraphML)
commits.relevance: CLI-only graph export. Not MCP tools.

commits.message: feat: Mermaid graph output with package subgraphs
commits.relevance: CLI-only graph export.

commits.message: feat: cache config support in .vsp.json and env vars
commits.relevance: Cache configuration via config file. ARC-1 already has cache config via env vars and CLI flags.

commits.message: feat: side effect extraction + LUW classification (Phase 1)
commits.relevance: Side effect analysis (DB writes, authority checks, commits) + LUW classification. Novel capability — could enhance SAPContext for safety analysis.

commits.message: feat: directional package boundary crossing analysis
commits.relevance: Package boundary violations — useful for architecture governance. Could extend SAPContext.

commits.message: feat: add package changelog and CTS change grouping
commits.relevance: Package-level changelog from CTS. Useful for release management. Could extend SAPTransport.

commits.message: feat: add AnalyzeABAPCode — abaplint-based static analysis (from PR #89)
commits.relevance: abaplint analysis as MCP tool. ARC-1 already has SAPLint with @abaplint/core.

commits.message: feat: Slim V2 Phase 3 — method-level dead code + --level flag
commits.relevance: Dead code detection at method level using where-used analysis. Novel capability — could be valuable SAPContext extension.

commits.message: fix: preserve auth headers on redirects (#90) + stateful lock sessions (#88)
commits.relevance: Auth headers lost on HTTP redirects + stateful session for locks. Verify ARC-1 http.ts handles redirects and stateful sessions correctly.

commits.message: feat: health MVP — E070 transport fallback for staleness signal
commits.relevance: Package health using transport data. CLI-focused, niche.

commits.message: feat: add graph engine with package boundary analysis, dynamic call detection, and improved help
commits.relevance: Graph engine for call analysis and package boundaries. Extends the call graph capabilities ARC-1 lacks.

commits.message: feat: add browser-based SSO authentication and session keep-alive (from PR #77)
commits.relevance: Browser SSO. ARC-1 already has OIDC/XSUAA/OAuth.

commits.message: feat: upgrade mcp-go v0.17.0 → v0.47.0, add Streamable HTTP transport (closes #21)
commits.relevance: VSP now has Streamable HTTP! ARC-1 no longer unique here. No action needed but updates competitive landscape.

commits.message: feat: add health analysis in MCP and CLI
commits.relevance: Package health analysis — test coverage, staleness, complexity. Novel MCP tool category.

commits.message: feat: add method signature reader
commits.relevance: Method signature extraction. ARC-1 SAPContext contract extraction already covers this.

commits.message: feat: add class sections reader
commits.relevance: Class section listing. ARC-1 method-surgery already handles this.

commits.message: feat: add rename preview analysis
commits.relevance: Rename refactoring preview. Maps to refactoring feature gap. abap-adt-api has rename (3 methods).

commits.message: feat: add slim dead-code candidate analysis
commits.relevance: Dead code detection. Grouped with Slim V2.

commits.message: feat: add api surface inventory for custom packages
commits.relevance: API surface inventory — lists public methods/interfaces per package. Useful for clean core / refactoring.

commits.message: feat: add where-used-config analysis in CLI and MCP
commits.relevance: Where-used for configuration objects. CLI-focused.

commits.message: feat: add usage examples analysis in CLI and MCP
commits.relevance: Usage examples tool. CLI-focused.

commits.message: feat: augment impact analysis with parser overlay
commits.relevance: Impact analysis enhancement. Go-specific parser.

commits.message: feat: add mermaid and html graph exports
commits.relevance: Graph visualization exports. CLI-focused.

commits.message: feat: add graph knowledge MVP with CLI and MCP queries
commits.relevance: Graph queries. Builds on call graph — ARC-1 doesn't have this yet.

commits.message: feat: add version history tools (3 tools, 8 tests)
commits.relevance: Version history — list versions, compare versions, get specific version. ARC-1 lacks this (#25 in matrix). abap-adt-api also has source versions.

commits.message: feat: add 7 i18n/translation tools with per-request language override (from PR #42, closes #40)
commits.relevance: 7 translation tools. ARC-1 has T100/text elements read but not full translation management. Closes gap from issue #40.

commits.message: feat: add 10 gCTS tools for git-enabled CTS (from PR #41, closes #39)
commits.relevance: 10 gCTS tools. ARC-1 lacks gCTS (Medium #15 in matrix). VSP closes this gap.

commits.message: feat: add GetAPIReleaseState for S/4HANA Clean Core checks (closes PR #53)
commits.relevance: API release state — check if objects/APIs are released for cloud. Critical for S/4HANA Clean Core compliance. ARC-1 should add this.

commits.message: feat: add GetCodeCoverage and GetCheckRunResults tools (from PR #84)
commits.relevance: Code coverage from unit tests + check run results. ARC-1 unit tests don't return coverage metrics.

commits.message: feat: add CDS impact analysis and element info tools (from PR #85)
commits.relevance: CDS impact analysis — downstream consumers of CDS views. ARC-1 SAPNavigate has where-used but not CDS-specific impact.

commits.message: feat: add offset and columns_only to GetTableContents (closes #34)
commits.relevance: Table contents pagination (offset) + columns_only mode. ARC-1 RunQuery has maxRows but not offset. Closes VSP #34.

commits.message: fix: stateless session default, installer resilience, graph namespace
commits.relevance: Various fixes. ARC-1 already handles sessions differently.

commits.message: fix: --verbose flag now works for all CLI subcommands
commits.relevance: CLI fix. Not relevant to MCP.

commits.message: feat: jseval — constructor return value, transpiled ABAP runs!
commits.relevance: JS evaluator in pure ABAP/Go — experimental compiler research, not MCP tooling

commits.message: feat: zcl_jseval — JavaScript evaluator in pure ABAP (2200 lines)
commits.relevance: Experimental — JS eval in ABAP. Not relevant to MCP tools.

commits.message: feat: pkg/jseval — minimal JavaScript evaluator in pure Go (500 lines)
commits.relevance: Go-native JS evaluator for running abaplint. Not applicable to TS ARC-1.

commits.message: feat: pure CLASS-METHODS — no FORMs in multi-class mode
commits.relevance: WASM/LLVM compiler improvements. Not MCP tooling.

commits.message: feat: vsp compile llvm — C/LLVM IR to ABAP in one command
commits.relevance: LLVM-to-ABAP compiler CLI. Experimental, not MCP.

commits.message: feat: LLVM IR → ABAP compiler — typed CLASS-METHODS from C/Rust
commits.relevance: LLVM-to-ABAP compiler. Experimental.

commits.message: feat: abapgit-pack CLI — create abapGit ZIP from ABAP sources
commits.relevance: abapGit ZIP packaging from CLI. Could be useful for gCTS integration but niche.

commits.message: feat: make install-user — install vsp to ~/.local/bin
commits.relevance: Go binary install target. ARC-1 uses npm.

commits.message: feat: Lua bindings for query/lint/parse/context + showcase scripts
commits.relevance: Lua scripting engine — Go-specific, not applicable to TS.

commits.message: feat: vsp deps — package dependency analysis + transport readiness
commits.relevance: Package dependency analysis + transport readiness check. ARC-1 has context/deps.ts but not transport readiness.

commits.message: feat: graph supports CLAS, PROG, FUGR, TRAN + dual CROSS/WBCROSSGT query
commits.relevance: Call graph with WBCROSSGT fallback. ARC-1 doesn't have call graph (#31 Low in matrix).

commits.message: feat: graph CLI + context --depth + updated docs
commits.relevance: Context depth control — ARC-1 SAPContext already has depth parameter.

commits.message: feat: ABAP linter with 8 rules — 864 issues on real corpus, 795μs/file
commits.relevance: Native Go ABAP linter (port of abaplint). ARC-1 uses @abaplint/core directly — same source, better maintained.

commits.message: feat: parse_abap + analyze_deps MCP tools — ABAP parser as MCP service
commits.relevance: ABAP parsing + dependency analysis as MCP tools. ARC-1 has deps.ts but doesn't expose parser as tool.

commits.message: feat: unified 5-layer code intelligence analyzer
commits.relevance: 5-layer analysis: regex → lexer → parser → cross-refs → type resolver. ARC-1 has layers 1-3 via abaplint.

commits.message: feat: native Go ABAP lexer (abaplint port) + context depth expansion
commits.relevance: Go port of abaplint lexer. ARC-1 uses the original @abaplint/core.

commits.message: feat: WASM-to-ABAP AOT compiler prototype (pkg/wasmcomp)
commits.relevance: WASM compiler. Experimental, not MCP tooling.

commits.message: feat: unify SAP_MODE with hyperfocused (one-tool) mode
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has hyperfocused mode (implemented from this design).

commits.message: feat: context compression — GetSource auto-appends dependency contracts (v2.28.0)
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has SAPContext with context compression.

commits.message: feat: ABAP LSP server with online diagnostics and go-to-definition
commits.relevance: ABAP Language Server Protocol integration. Interesting but niche — most users use Eclipse ADT or VS Code abaplint.

commits.message: feat: strategic decomposition, one-tool mode, and CLI DevOps surface
commits.relevance: Architecture refactoring. ARC-1 has different architecture.

commits.message: fix: CreateTransport uses S/4HANA 757 compatible endpoint and format (#70)
commits.relevance: S/4HANA transport endpoint compatibility. Verify ARC-1 transport.ts uses correct endpoint.

commits.message: fix: SyntaxCheck uses shorter object URI for long namespaced classes (#52)
commits.relevance: Namespaced class URI truncation in syntax check. Verify ARC-1 handles /namespace/ objects correctly.

commits.message: fix: install tools bypass SAP_ALLOWED_PACKAGES restrictions (#54)
commits.relevance: Install tools bypass. ARC-1 doesn't deploy ABAP to SAP.

commits.message: fix: CreatePackage safety check uses package name being created (#71)
commits.relevance: Package safety check bug — was checking empty string instead of package name. Verify ARC-1 safety.ts.

commits.message: fix: auto-retry on 401 Unauthorized after idle timeout (#35)
commits.relevance: 401 auto-retry after session timeout. ARC-1 http.ts should handle this — verify.

commits.message: feat: add GetDependencyZIP function and tests for dependency retrieval (#60)
commits.relevance: Export dependencies as abapGit ZIP. Useful for offline analysis but niche.

commits.message: fix: add --parent, --include, --method flags to CLI source command
commits.relevance: CLI-specific flags. ARC-1 is MCP-only.

commits.message: feat: iterative activation with package filtering + 100 stars article
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has batch activation.

commits.message: feat: add ignore_warnings parameter to EditSource
commits.relevance: ignore_warnings for EditSource — syntax warnings block saves by default. ARC-1 edit_method may have same issue.

commits.message: feat: CreatePackage software_component + viper env var fix
commits.relevance: Software component for packages. ARC-1 create already supports this.

commits.message: feat: allow transportable package creation with --enable-transports
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already supports transportable package creation.

commits.message: fix: namespace URL encoding for all ADT operations
commits.relevance: Namespace URL encoding (/namespace/ → %2fnamespace%2f). Verify ARC-1 encodeURIComponent handles this.

commits.message: feat: v2.23.0 - GitExport to disk, GetAbapHelp via WebSocket
commits.relevance: GetAbapHelp (F1 docs) via WebSocket ZADT_VSP. ARC-1 doesn't deploy ABAP — would need ADT-native approach.

commits.message: feat: add Level 2 GetAbapHelp - real docs from SAP system via ZADT_VSP
commits.relevance: ABAP F1 help. Requires ZADT_VSP deployment — not compatible with ARC-1 approach.

commits.message: feat: add GetAbapHelp tool for ABAP keyword documentation (#10)
commits.relevance: ABAP help. Low #38 in feature matrix.
